# Unshakeable Faith
## Scripture
"So we do not lose heart. Though our outer self is wasting away, our inner self is being renewed day by day." – 2 Corinthians 4:16
## Reflection
As men, we face various challenges and setbacks in life. We may feel worn out, drained, and defeated. But the Bible reminds us that our faith is unshakeable and that it's being renewed every day. Our inner self, our spirit, is being transformed by the power of God. This is what gives us the strength to persevere and to keep moving forward, even when everything around us seems to be falling apart.

We must learn to look beyond our circumstances and focus on the hope that we have in Jesus Christ. Our faith is not based on our feelings or our circumstances, but on the unchanging character of God. As we fix our eyes on Him, we will find the strength to carry on, even in the midst of adversity.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 10 sit-ups while declaring that your faith is unshakeable, because God is with you."
